assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 28-34: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section maps affected component to rhtpa-backend in Source Repositories table with Deployment Context = 'customer-shipped'. Line 34: 'Deployment context for the affected repository: **customer-shipped**'

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 28-36 performs deployment context lookup. remediation.md line 10 records 'Deployment context: customer-shipped' as part of the CVE metadata under Triage Outcome.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 (lines 71-82) and Task 2 (lines 139-146) both contain a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection under '## Implementation Notes' with text: 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 82 and 146 both state: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.' All three elements (CVE assignment, advisory preparation, formal disclosure) are explicitly mentioned.
